items.title: Grunt Style American 1776 Flag - Patriotic Graphic Tee, Men's Short Sleeve T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: grunt, style, american, 1776, flag, patriotic. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
